description_long: A muscular, bald adult male figure stands upright, adorned with a large beaded necklace and a single-shoulder robe that leaves his right arm and shoulder exposed. He wears a traditional martial arts-style outfit, including a loose, belted tunic, cropped pants, and cloth wraps around his lower legs. A red sash is tied at his waist, and a wooden staff or polearm with a broad, ornate blade is positioned beside him. His right arm is bare, while his left is covered by the draped robe, and he carries a gourd attached to his belt. The figure's footwear consists of simple, flat shoes, and his overall appearance suggests a monk or martial artist archetype. The materials and textures evoke a combination of fabric, wood, and metal, with a matte finish and visible folds in the clothing.
description: A bald, muscular adult male in a martial arts robe with a beaded necklace, carrying a gourd and standing beside a polearm weapon. His outfit features a single-shoulder tunic, cropped pants, and flat shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, beaded necklace, exposed right arm and shoulder, and the polearm weapon standing upright beside him.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped robe over the left arm, the gourd at the waist, and the profile of the head and staff.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, the bald head, the gourd, and the full length of the polearm weapon.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bare right arm, the side profile of the face, and the staff aligned with the body.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional martial arts robe with a single-shoulder tunic, cropped pants, cloth leg wraps, and a large beaded necklace
